ip_outcome_note: Card name reads 'Mr. Buu'. Mr. Buu (Good Buu) is the reformed pink Majin who befriended Mr. Satan and became an ally of the Z Fighters after splitting from his evil counterpart at the end of the Dragon Ball Z Buu Saga. The pink rotund antennae'd figure with yellow-white outfit matches the canonical visual of Good Buu universally. Identity unambiguous from card name and distinctive visual design.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-015 is a red Common Battle card: 10000 power, 5000 combo power. Era: Baby Saga. Mr. Buu appears in BT4's Baby Saga framing as one of the few characters resistant to Baby's possession — Baby infected most of Earth but not Good Buu or Mr. Satan, who remained uncontrolled allies during that arc. [Source: WebSearch snippets via LevelUpGamesmd BT4-015 listing; WebSearch: Baby Dragon Ball GT lore]
sources: WebSearch: Baby Dragon Ball GT Tuffle parasite villain Wiki

trivia_bullets.text: Mr. Buu (Good Buu) split from Kid Buu / Evil Buu through fission at the end of Dragon Ball Z's Buu Saga. He bonded with Mr. Satan and retired from destruction, eventually becoming a student of Mr. Satan's martial arts school and a recurring Z Fighter. His appearance in BT4's Baby Saga era cards is lore-consistent: he was one of few not possessed by Baby. [Source: WebSearch snippet via dragonball.fandom.com Good Buu page; Wikipedia: Majin Buu]

Good Buu's distinctive visual identity — pink, rotund, antennae, yellow-white outfit — is one of the most recognizable silhouettes in Dragon Ball. The DBS TCG distinguishes between Majin Buu forms (Kid Buu, Super Buu, Good Buu / Mr. Buu) across different cards and eras. BT4-015 uses the 'Mr. Buu' name specifically, signifying the post-reformation Good Buu incarnation rather than his earlier destructive forms. [Source: WebSearch snippet via Game Rant: All of Buu's Transformations Explained]
sources: Game Rant: Dragon Ball All of Buu's Transformations Explained
